description_long: This is a stylized humanoid figure with a fantasy-inspired appearance, featuring a pair of small, curved horns on the head and a long, thin tail ending in a spade shape. The figure is dressed in a coordinated outfit consisting of a sleeveless crop top adorned with star motifs, matching shorts, and thigh-high boots. Arm coverings extend from the upper arms to the wrists, and the outfit is accented with gold trim and decorative elements. The character's hands are gloveless, and the exposed midriff and upper thighs suggest a costume designed for agility or performance. The overall build is slender and athletic, with a youthful, animated facial expression and long, straight hair cascading down the back. This figure would stand out in an urban environment due to its fantasy elements and distinctive attire.
description: A slender, fantasy-inspired humanoid with horns, a tail, and a coordinated star-themed outfit, including a crop top, shorts, and thigh-high boots. The figure has long hair and a youthful, animated appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the star-adorned crop top, shorts, arm coverings, and facial features with horns clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the curve of the horns, the protruding tail, and the figure's posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long hair, the back of the outfit, the full length of the tail, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, tail, and the figure's stance.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy-themed crop top and shorts set with thigh-high boots and long arm coverings
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
